top_priority_after_panel_recovery.reason: the page1 file-browser compiled-data envelope is largely exhausted offline, and the latest real runs proved the panel is transport-silent across runtime commands, public whmi-wri entry, and a DTR/RTS pulse attempt. the highest-value move is now the prepared desktop SD recovery handoff bundle, which already contains verification and follow-up scripts.

secondary_priority_after_panel_recovery.reason: after the SD recovery completes and the SD card is removed, use the prepared follow-up script, which will clear SD recovery state and continue with the serial/orchestrated runtime checks.

external_recovery_package.reason: the latest local orchestrated recovery, baud sweep, and public whmi-wri entry probe all stayed silent. this known-good case31 backup is the current concrete external recovery package already kept in the repo.

notes: The latest real orchestrated run still ended in connect/sendme silence after an official GUI recovery attempt, so the next step now requires physical or otherwise external recovery before more local live automation can help.
Do not continue large batches of page-local byte patching before the orchestrated recovery-plus-seed-side path has been exercised on recovered hardware.
Within the seed-side runner, text-select is the strongest control sample, file-stream is second, and file-browser is the target falsification sample.
